TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-pear-wang-3

S.FORM: pan to mo cihi ci mo ake'i mameoi ci hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 有一位有點年紀的男人
There was a somewhat old man.

S.FORM: moso toa to beahci to bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.TRANSL: (他)在採李子
(He) was picking plum.

S.FORM: mo pan to mo sucaefi ci mo eakako to eangi ci hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 有個男的牽著一隻羊經過。
There was a man pulling a goat passes by.

S.FORM: o'a isi maka mi'usni mo asonʉ angu 'anana'o ho mo toa.
S.TRANSL: 他沒有注意到（經過的人），他採得太認真了。
He didn't even paid him attention because of his hard working on picking.

S.FORM: oh mo asngʉc toa ho mʉ isi teapha na ito fucu na ito to isi ngovei to sʉnʉsi ci ci fucu o 'o isi toai ci beahci.
S.TRANSL: 他一直採，把採下來的水果放在那個掛在他脖子上的袋子裡。
He didn't stop, and put (the fruit) into the bag that was hung on his neck.

S.FORM: ho mi cu ngangcʉngcʉ mo eu'sipeohʉ to evi ho.
S.TRANSL: 如果袋子滿了，他就爬下來。
He climbed down the tree when it (the bag) was full.

S.FORM: ho i ivaho eu'sipepe ho toa to beahci to bunʉvhʉ.
S.TRANSL: 他又再次爬上(樹）採水果。
He then climbed up again to pick plum fruit.

S.FORM: neaomane mi cu pan to mo sucaefi ci mo eon to jidensa ci 'o'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 一會兒,有一個男孩騎著腳踏車經過。
For a while, there was a boy riding a bike passed by.

S.FORM: mo tos mo tosvo to to isi sii to beahci to isi toai.
S.TRANSL: 他（男孩）停在那人放採下來的水果的地方。
He stopped where the gathered fruit was put/laid.

S.FORM: ia siai isi asona na'na tata'za ho isi aha'va cono hafa 'o mo eon to khago ci beahci ho.
S.TRANSL: 他可能想要那些水果，帶走了一籃。
He probably wanted to have the fruit, and took one basket of fruit away.

S.FORM: ho cu sia to jidensa ho mongoi.
S.TRANSL: 放在腳踏車上，然後離開。
Put it on the bike and left.

S.FORM: o'a isi maka cohivi na ito mo toa ci mo asonʉ angu 'anana'o.
S.TRANSL: 那個（採果的老人）完全沒注意到，或許是太努力（摘果子）。
It wasn't noticed at all (by the old man), because he was so devoted to the picking of the fruit.

S.FORM: i'o oko no hahocngʉ isi cu hafa 'o mo ah 'o mo cono khago ci beahci ho ho eon to jidensa u ho mongoi.
S.TRANSL: 那個男孩將一籃水果放在腳踏車上，騎著腳踏車離開了。
The boy loaded the basket of fruit, and left on his bike.

S.FORM: aomane mo eupteʉlʉ 'o mo cihi ci mo maezo eon to jidensa ci mamespingi ho.
S.TRANSL: 一會兒他（男孩）遇到一位也是騎著腳踏車的女孩。
A while later, he met a girl who was also riding a bike.

S.FORM: te eupa zou eupaeupteʉlʉ.
S.TRANSL: （他們）會互相...就是互相見面。
(They) will.... That is, met each other.

S.FORM: isi apemza mi'usni na ito hahocngʉ 'o mamespingi ho mo eupteʉlʉ.
S.TRANSL: 當他們兩個相遇，那男孩很專注的看著那個女孩。
When they came across, the boy was looking at the girl devotedly.

S.FORM: ci ma mo akameosʉ isi ta'poepuza na ito na i'o ceopungusi na ito hahocngʉ mi cu supeohʉ.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼會突然男孩的帽子被風吹走了, 就掉了下來。
Why in a sudden the hat of the boy was blown away by wind. The hat fell.

S.FORM: 'a isi maka aiti ho mo ea fatua 'o 'o ntesi mia.
S.TRANSL: 看到他要走的路上有石頭。
It was seen that there was stone in the way which he would go.

S.FORM: mi cu efʉ mi cu smoftongʉ to fatu ho smopcuku.
S.TRANSL: 他撞到石頭跌了下來。
He bumped into the stone and fell down.

S.FORM: 'a te alʉ alʉ supeohʉ omp cono supeohʉ na 'o beahci ci isi ci isi ea ci beahci to na ito bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.TRANSL: 他載走的那（一籃）李子的果實也掉了下來。
The (basket) of plum he took fell.

S.FORM: moh mi cu mongoi 'o 'o 'oko no mamespingi.
S.TRANSL: 那個女孩離開了。
The girl left.

S.FORM: mo esmi 'o mo teyu ci 'o'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 來了三個男孩。
Then there arrived three boys.

S.FORM: ihe 'so to'usni ho zou ivaha teapha to khago na 'o 'o mo aemo'ʉ ci ci beahci ci beahci ci beahci no bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙把散落一地的李子再次放回籃子。
They helped put the spilt plum fruit again into the basket.

S.FORM: ho mi cu mi cu ivaho e'ohʉ eupevai om 'o mo tueu.
S.TRANSL: 那三個男孩離開(他)走了。
The three boys left (him), and went on...

S.FORM: ho ivaho e'ohʉ o ho 'o mo eon to jidensa ci hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 然後他又騎上他的腳踏車。
And then... He went on again on his bike..

S.FORM: eo o esohueu ho.
S.TRANSL: 他們對著男孩吹口哨。
(They) whistled (at him, the boy riding a bike).

S.FORM: euoveia 'o 'o mo cihi ci hahocngʉ ho eoveineni 'o pu ceopngu.
S.TRANSL: 其中一個男孩回來，把帽子還給他。
One of the boys returned, and returned the hat to the boy.

S.FORM: ho mi cu mongoi.
S.TRANSL: (被給梨子的男孩)離開了。
(The boy given pears) left.

S.FORM: ivaho mo'unu maica.
S.TRANSL: 他往（他同伴的方向）這樣離開了。
(He walked) toward the direction of his accompany.

S.FORM: i'o mo tueu ci hahocngʉ mo mah to eh isi faeni to oko no hohac hahocngʉ ci ci beahci.
S.TRANSL: 那三個男生帶著男孩給的梨子。
The three took the pears given.

S.FORM: ho sucaefi to mo toa toa to ah toa toa to beahci no bʉnʉvhʉ ci ci hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 經過那個採李（梨）子的男人。
and passed the one that picked..picked pears/plum fruit.

S.FORM: mi cu sipeohʉ 'o hahocngʉ.
S.TRANSL: 那個男人（從樹上）下來。
Then the man climbed down.

S.FORM: ne isi cu aoma'va cohivi.
S.TRANSL: 他終究還是知道。
And (he) finally learned.

S.FORM: mo aʉlʉ esmi 'o mo tueu ho mah to mo macici m macoconi to mo to conci beahci.
S.TRANSL: 剛好有三個男孩經過，每個人有一個梨子。
There happened to arrive three (boys), each with a pear.

S.FORM: isi at'ingha no eainca.
S.TRANSL: 他只好想...
He just thinks...

S.FORM: ci isi asona eainca no to'tohʉngʉsi isi ihe nana eaa.
S.TRANSL: 或許他想是他們拿走了梨子。
that it probably his thinking that they took (them).

S.FORM: mo c'o maica 'e si 'e os'o aiti.
S.TRANSL: 我剛看的就像那樣。像那樣。
What I just saw was just like that.
